overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in red and black armor exploring a dimly lit industrial barracks or dormitory room with metal bunk beds. The character approaches a sleeping person on a lower bunk, examines a wall poster, and exits through double doors at the far end of the room.

entered.detail: stacked metal bunk beds with white mattresses and pillows lining the left wall
long white rectangular table with several chairs around it
green upholstered bench against the left wall
long fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling
industrial pipes and conduits running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an industrial dormitory room illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights. Metal bunk beds line the left wall while a long mess table sits on the right. The character approaches a person sleeping on a lower bunk bed to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: military barracks sleeping quarters with metal bunk beds

events.description: character stops walking and stands still to observe the sleeping person
character turns away from the bed and begins walking toward the wall poster

agents.ego_description: standing still and observing the sleeping person on the lower bunk before turning away

entered.detail: red poster with white text and graphics mounted on the back concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the bunk bed to observe the sleeping person lying under a white sheet. After a moment, the character turns and begins walking toward a red poster on the far wall, passing the green sofa.

scene_state.functional_zone: military barracks common area near wall poster

pair of metal doors with windows at the far end of the room

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and stands before a red poster mounted on the concrete wall. The room's industrial piping and fluorescent lighting are visible overhead. A wall monitor and double exit doors become visible in the background.

events.description: character turns away from the poster and walks toward the exit doors
character approaches and exits through the double doors

agents.ego_description: turning away from the poster and walking toward the double doors to exit the room

segments.scene_description: The character turns from the poster and walks toward a set of double doors at the far end of the room. The white mess table and green sofa are now visible on opposite sides as the character approaches and exits through the doorway, leaving the barracks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial dormitory that leads from a sleeping area toward a distant exit. It begins with the character walking past metal bunk beds and a long mess table under overhead fluorescent lights, eventually pausing to observe a person sleeping under a white sheet. As the character turns away from the bunk, the camera follows them past a green sofa toward a red poster mounted on a concrete wall beneath exposed industrial piping. The scene then expands to reveal a wall monitor and double doors in the background before the character turns from the poster to head toward the far end of the room. Finally, the camera tracks the character as they pass between the mess table and sofa to exit through the double doors, leaving the barracks behind.
